title: galium trifidum subsp. typicum
intro: Galium trifidum subsp. typicum, also known as the slender woodruff or woodruff, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, due to its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Galium trifidum subsp. typicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
